sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59564" key="kra/buzos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κράβυζος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n59564.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shell-fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
